name: International Money Express, Inc.
business: International Money Express, Inc. (Intermex) is a global omnichannel money remittance services company focused primarily on the United States to Latin America and the Caribbean corridor. It provides money transfer services to beneficiaries in over 60 countries through a network of over 100,000 independent agents, 118 company-operated stores, and digital channels. The company also generates revenue from Remittance-as-a-Service (RaaS) partnerships and ancillary financial services.
sellsTo: Consumers in the United States, Canada, and Europe sending money to Latin America, Africa, and Asia

exposures.sentence: Our money remittance services are also available on the Internet via our websites (intermexonline.com and online.i-transfer.es), co-branded websites with our digital partners and mobile device applications.
A cybersecurity incident or breach of security in the information systems on which we rely could adversely affect our reputation, business, financial condition, and results of operations.

catalysts.sentence: The Company cannot predict with certainty whether and when any of the remaining required closing conditions will be satisfied or if the Merger will close, but currently anticipates that the Merger will be consummated in the second quarter of 2026.
The anticipated effect of this reduction in expenses will be primarily realized beginning in the second quarter of 2026.
the Company has suspended activity under the Repurchase Program and does not intend to make further repurchases under it during the pendency of the Merger Agreement.
